title: Ordinary Gods
author: Nerdy Fiction
tagline: The universe does not announce itself.
description: On the last night of 2026, at exactly 10:00 PM Eastern, something changed at the level where reality itself is written. Eight billion people felt nothing. Twelve hesitated. This is the story of four of them.

characters.name: Robert Calloway
characters.tagline: An actor who keeps showing up fifteen minutes early.

characters.name: Alex Whitfield
characters.tagline: A mechanic who watches the game with surgical focus.
